about.title: About Us
paragraphs: HHFISH – a pangasius prestige farmer and producer in Vietnam Founded in 2007, HHFISH is known as one of the leading fish farmers in the Mekong Delta, Vietnam. With an area about 100 ha, stretching over the nine districts and cities of Ben Tre and neighbor provinces, HHFISH produces 30,000 tons of raw material/ year, provides for the majority of processing plants in the area. 2011 is an important year of HHFISH. With the available farming advantages, in order to meet the increasing market demand, HHFISH decided to establish a processing plant in An Hiep Industrial Zone, Chau Thanh District, Ben Tre Province, Viet Nam which is equipped with the most advanced processing technologies of the world and become the most modern plant in Vietnam at the moment.

Although newly established, HHFISH, with its own outstanding advantages, confidently affirms with the market about a powerful and reputable supplier of Vietnam seafood industry in the future. With modern equipments, imported from the most famous seafood machine producers in the world i.e. Germany, Holland, Sweden... at the latest, HHFISH produces around 40,000 tons of material per year, providing the market with best quality products, most competitive price and best service to all customers on the five continents. Moreover, with the existing aquaculture activities, HHFISH also has a preponderance about the closed process from breeding, farming to processing. Because of this closed process, HHFISH can strictly control the quality of products from raw materials to finished ones and make product traceability easily to satisfy to the best of all strict requirements of importers around the world.

Besides, human resource also plays an important factor that can support HHFISH can go further, with special policy of recruitment, HHFISH have been recruited about 2,000 skillful workers, as well as direct managing experts with heartful, dynamic and creative spirit to meet the current production demands of the company. HHFISH has successfully applied the international quality management system HACCP and is under the progress to apply the systems of BRCGS, HACCP, ISO 22000, HALAL. Our guideline is "Our quality, Your Safety", HHFISH is coming towards a natural, green, pure processing and farming environment from which to produce the best products for all consumers all over the world.
